commit.subject: LU-19752 kernel: update RHEL 9.7 [5.14.0-611.24.1.el9_7]
commit.message:
LU-19752 kernel: update RHEL 9.7 [5.14.0-611.24.1.el9_7]

Update RHEL 9.7 kernel to 5.14.0-611.24.1.el9_7.
